listings.title: Research Engineer 2 - Hardware and Software Design (Temporary)

required: Applicants who do not meet these qualifications WILL NOT be forwarded to the Hiring Manager.Bachelor’s degree in computer science or related engineering field and two years of designing hardware and software. Experience with robotics, data acquisition, and other engineered devices will be considered relevant.
Bachelor’s degree in Systems, Electrical, Mechanical Aerospace, or related Engineering field AND 5-10 years’ work experience.
Bachelor’s Degree in computer science, information science, or a related field or experience.
Minimum three years of experience in the following:
Experience with SaaS products such as Workday Finance.

Experience working with enterprise Finance systems and the configuration and maintenance thereof, including working specifically with the Workday Finance (or similar) Procurment, Supply Chain, Accounts Payable, or Supplier Contracts modules.
Experience analyzing Finance business processes and documenting requirements.
Experience supporting system testing and/or data validation activities, including developing and maintaining manual and automated test scripts.
Experience with reporting, data, and security in a SaaS environment.
Demonstrated ability to understand business and technical design considerations and facilitate problem solving/issue resolution in the context of a customer service frame.
Ability to communicate clearly, in writing and in verbal presentations, to both technical and non-technical audiences.
Experience interacting with customers, including resolution of complex inquiries and efficient performance during high-volume timeframes.
Experience providing production support of mission critical systems.
Demonstrated written/oral communication, technical documentation, user liaising, and personal interaction abilities.
Bachelor's Degree in Information Technology, Business Information Systems, or related field, or equivalent combination of education and experience.
3 years minimum experience required.
3+ years of hands-on experience administering or configuring the ITSM Platform (i.e. ServiceNow)
3+ years hands-on experience administering or configuing SDLC applications (i.e. Jira)
Demonstrated experience with ITSM modules (Incident, Problem, Change, Service Catalog).
Experience using Jira for release management, backlog tracking, sprint coordination, and change documentation.
Strong understanding of platform governance, update sets, and release management practices.
Experience with identity and access management concepts and role-based access control.
Strong troubleshooting and problem-solving skills.
